subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-29 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: O peoples of Europe! How vigilant are ye in this matter, and were it not for this, life and existence would have proven most arduous unto you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهالی اروپا چقدر در این مسئله دقت دارند و اگر این نبود حیات و زندگی از برای آنها بسیار صعب بود
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @symbolism, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
